This file includes (variable highlights):
- Diagnosis (ICD diagnosis) codes
- HCPCS code
- Revenue center codes, dates, unit counts
- Part C Benefit Package and Contract number
- Organization NPI number
- No payment information
Special considerations:
- Many Medicare Advantage Plans offer extra coverage in addition to services covered under traditional fee-for-service Medicare (e.g., vision, hearing, dental, and/or health and wellness programs). Encounter
